config.common.enableInGameMessage.toolti: Shows a welcome message with Discord, GitHub, and support links on first join. Requires a game restart.
config.common.maxDistanceFromCenter: Underground Village Max Distance From Center
config.common.maxDistanceFromCenter.tool: Maximum distance that structure pieces can generate from the village center.
config.common.placementSeparation.toolti: Minimum chunk distance between underground and underwater village placements.
config.common.placementSpacing.tooltip: Distance (in chunks) between underground and underwater village placements. Must be greater than separation.
config.common.structureSize.tooltip: Controls the overall size of underground village structures.
config.common.title: Underground Villages Settings
config.common.waterMaxDistanceFromCenter: Underwater Village Max Distance From Center
Maximum distance that water-based structure pieces can generate from the center.
config.common.waterStructureSize.tooltip: Controls the size of water-based underground village structures.
text.autoconfig.underground_village.opti: Maximum distance the structure pieces can be from the center (1 to 128)
Minimum distance between underground and underwater structures (1 to 200).
Default size of the underground structure (from 1 to 30)
Distance between underground and underwater structure generation attempts (1 to 200).
